---
title: "MALDIquant_testing1"
author: "Mathijs van Drongelen"
date: "2026-05-18"
output: html_document
---

```{r libraries}
library(MALDIquant)
library(MALDIquant)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r practice1}
s <- createMassSpectrum(mass=1:10, intensity=1:10,metaData=list(name="Spectrum1"))
s
mass(s)
intensity(s)
metaData(s)

test1<-MALDIquant::createMassSpectrum(mass=c(4,8,2,8,11,1.6,3.5,5.7),intensity=c(9,1,24,7,34,4,6,5),metaData = list(name="spectrum2"))
plot(test1)

# importing data from 'Mass spectra Converted to zXML'
 # Importing is done with MALDIquantForeign package not MALDIquant itself
data_101mzML<-MALDIquantForeign::importMzMl("Mass Spectra converted to zXML/Mass Spectra converted to zXML/240116_samples 101 tot en met 110 240116-1238-1011014561/101.mzML")
plot(data_101mzML[[1]])
 
# https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/MALDIquant/MALDIquant.pdf
# testing data for MALDIquant is data(fiedler2009subset), data from a 2009 study

```

![MALDIquant vignette workflow spectrofotometrie](C:/Users/Mathijs/Pictures/Screenshots/MALDIquant_workflow.png)
```{r}
# steps of spectrometric analysis, including but not limited to importing, QC and smoothing
 # one chunk per step with text inbetween 

```
